text.title: Cloud Run Traffic Management Procedure
text.summary: Step-by-step procedure to apply the cloud-run-traffic-management methodology end-to-end. Each step lists explicit input → action → output and (optionally) a decision-gate.

step.name: smoke
step.action: Run smoke + integration tests against tagged URL.

step.name: cleanup-tags
step.action: Remove promotion tag; archive previous revision tag.

step.name: rollback-if-needed
step.action: Promote previous known-good revision to 100% via `update-traffic --to-revisions`.
